description: Negative/error-path: Client correctly handles server-initiated resourceRead requests and responds with the file content. Client surfaces JSON-RPC error code -32601.
notes: Auto-generated from D7 negative paths: rpc.resourceRead.edge.server-initiated-request. The resource* family (resourceRead, resourceWrite, resourceList, etc.) MAY be initiated by the server toward the client. Clients must handle incoming resource* requests from the server.

steps.label: send resourceRead to trigger the error condition
